scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix artcf-backend" "npm run dev --prefix artcf-website"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix artcf-backend" "npm run start --prefix artcf-website"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix artcf-backend && npm install --prefix artcf-website
